items.title: A quality game, not just a gacha
items.summary:
I’ve tried a few gacha games and played until end game and dropped off. This game is the exception because the gameplay and game mechanics are so good.  

Team building is very satisfying and forms your card deck. Then playing through a level is even better as you add to your deck strategy as you go. It is too easy to start but once you get to the more challenging content the game shines.

Translation is AI, which is a shame because I love the story and themes of the game and it breaks immersion sometimes. Even with that though, still 5/5
items.author: Allnicknamestaken$&@1
